creator: cam@9.nws.net
text:
The pr docs/10017 was not a good pr: the patch was not properly inserted. Added my site to http://www.freebsd.org/projects/newbies.html and corrected an english errata (organisation --> organization) Fix: Apply the following patch to newbies.html 79a80 >

  • You can also try The FreeBSD User Guide, a kind of Q&A/Tutorial for new users.

    • 136c137 < Associates. It is organised as a series of short articles each of --- > Associates. It is organized as a series of short articles each of
